data.body: During the post-merge hook that runs kno pull, add a drift threshold check that warns the user when local unpushed knots events are accumulating beyond a reasonable threshold. This gives the user a nudge to run kno push before drift gets out of hand. Implementation: after pull completes, count local event files not yet pushed to remote and compare against a configurable threshold (e.g. stored in meta table). If exceeded, print a warning to stderr.
data.title: Add drift threshold warning during post-merge kno pull
